name: Mojito
description: A wooden beach table overlooks the ocean horizon as palm trees sway under a golden sunset. Slow waves roll onto the shore while distant seagulls drift across the sky. The atmosphere feels refreshing, calm, and endlessly relaxing.
taste_notes: Served ice-cold with a crisp, sparkling texture. Mint creates a cooling sensation while the finish remains light, clean, and refreshing.

name: Whiskey Sour
description: Rain taps gently against floor-to-ceiling windows beside a dark oak table. Warm amber lamps glow across leather chairs while jazz drifts through the room. City lights shimmer through the storm outside.
taste_notes: Silky and velvety from the foam layer, chilled but comforting. The finish is smooth with lingering warmth from the whiskey.

name: Margarita
description: A rooftop skyline pulses with neon signs and moving spotlights. The DJ keeps the energy high as the city glows beneath the night sky. Every corner feels electric and alive.
taste_notes: Extremely cold with a sharp citrus snap. The salted rim contrasts against a clean, dry finish that leaves the palate energized.

name: Cosmopolitan
description: Pink ambient lighting reflects across polished marble counters and crystal surfaces. The skyline sparkles beyond expansive windows. Sophisticated conversations blend into the glamorous atmosphere.
taste_notes: Smooth and chilled with a light, elegant body. The finish feels crisp and polished with gentle citrus brightness.

name: Old Fashioned
description: Dark wood furniture surrounds a fireplace glowing softly in the background. Vintage books line the shelves while traces of smoke drift through the room. The mood is timeless and refined.
taste_notes: Dense and spirit-forward with a smooth, slow texture. The finish is long, warm, and slightly oily across the palate.

name: Piña Colada
description: An infinity pool merges seamlessly into turquoise ocean waters. Tropical breezes move across a floating deck as sunset reflections dance on the surface. Every detail feels luxurious and carefree.
taste_notes: Thick, icy, and creamy with a frozen-smooth texture. The finish is soft and cooling with lingering tropical richness.

name: Espresso Martini
description: A designer desk glows under laptop light while the city skyline stretches into the darkness. Fresh coffee aromas linger in the air. Creativity and focus drive the late-night atmosphere.
taste_notes: Cold and velvety with a creamy foam cap. The finish is rich, smooth, and slightly drying from the coffee.

name: Aperol Spritz
description: A sunlit terrace overlooks charming streets lined with vines and warm lanterns. The sky glows orange as evening settles across the city. Laughter and conversation fill the air.
taste_notes: Lightly sparkling and refreshing with lively bubbles. The finish remains bright and airy with a pleasant dryness.

name: Blue Lagoon
description: Neon blue lighting reflects through glass floors above digital waves. Holographic elements pulse around the room. The setting feels like a luxury destination from the future.
taste_notes: Ice-cold and crisp with a clean, refreshing mouthfeel. The finish is bright and slightly sparkling.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri
description: Morning sunlight pours through blooming flowers and fresh greenery. Butterflies drift across the garden while dew sparkles on leaves. Everything feels vibrant and full of life.
taste_notes: Frozen and slushy with a soft fruit texture. The finish is cool, juicy, and refreshing.

name: Mai Tai
description: Bamboo tables sit beneath swaying palms as torches illuminate the tropical night. A volcano island glows in the distance beyond dense jungle scenery. Adventure and celebration define the mood.
taste_notes: Smooth with layered textures from citrus and rum. The finish is warm and slightly rich without feeling heavy.

name: Long Island Iced Tea
description: Colorful party lights flash across a packed dance floor. Music fills the room while friends gather around and celebrate. The atmosphere is loud, energetic, and unforgettable.
taste_notes: Chilled and surprisingly smooth despite its strength. The finish is long and warming with a slight cola fizz.

name: Martini
description: A luxury penthouse overlooks a moonlit skyline through floor-to-ceiling glass. Black marble surfaces reflect subtle lighting and minimalist design. Every detail suggests confidence and precision.
taste_notes: Extremely cold and crystal-clear with a sleek, dry texture. The finish is sharp, clean, and elegant.

name: Sangria
description: Stone architecture surrounds a courtyard lit by hanging lanterns. Vineyard views stretch beyond the walls while live guitar music fills the evening air. The setting feels warm and welcoming.
taste_notes: Cool and juicy with fruit pieces adding texture. The finish is smooth and pleasantly refreshing.

name: Moscow Mule
description: Snow falls gently outside a cozy wooden cabin. Firelight reflects off polished copper surfaces while warmth fills the room. The contrast between winter and comfort defines the scene.
taste_notes: Very cold and effervescent with a lively ginger bite. The finish tingles pleasantly and remains refreshing.

name: Paloma
description: Cactus silhouettes stand against a glowing orange horizon above canyon landscapes. Warm winds sweep through the desert as daylight slowly fades. The mood is peaceful yet adventurous.
taste_notes: Bright and sparkling with a refreshing carbonation. The finish is crisp, clean, and thirst-quenching.

name: Mimosa
description: An elegant rooftop breakfast setting shines under bright morning sunlight. Fresh flowers decorate beautifully arranged tables. The atmosphere feels sophisticated, cheerful, and effortless.
taste_notes: Light-bodied and sparkling with delicate bubbles. The finish is clean, uplifting, and refreshing.

name: Gin & Tonic
description: Sunlight streams through a glass greenhouse filled with exotic plants. Dew particles sparkle among lush greenery and natural pathways. The environment feels fresh, bright, and alive.
taste_notes: Crisp and highly carbonated with a refreshing bite. The finish is dry, cooling, and clean.

name: Dark & Stormy
description: Dark clouds gather above crashing ocean waves beside a weathered wooden pier. Lightning flashes illuminate the horizon in brief moments of brilliance. The atmosphere feels dramatic and powerful.
taste_notes: Cold and fizzy with a strong ginger kick. The finish is deep, warming, and slightly spicy.

name: Passion Fruit Martini
description: A luxury rooftop lounge overlooks a dazzling skyline filled with modern architecture. Gold accents and reflective surfaces catch the city lights from every angle. The experience feels glamorous and exclusive.
taste_notes: Smooth and chilled with a velvety texture. The finish is vibrant, silky, and lightly warming.
